mapper.sql: id, doctor_name, hospital_id, dept_id, title, specialty, academic_background, schedule_time, consultation_fee, rating, is_deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.hospital_id, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.academic_background, d.schedule_time, d.consultation_fee, d.rating, d.is_deleted, d.create_time, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, dept.dept_name FROM doctor_info d LEFT JOIN hospital_info h ON d.hospital_id = h.id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN hospital_department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id AND dept.is_deleted = 0 WHERE d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.rating DESC

SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.hospital_id, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.academic_background, d.schedule_time, d.consultation_fee, d.rating, d.is_deleted, d.create_time, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, dept.dept_name FROM doctor_info d LEFT JOIN hospital_info h ON d.hospital_id = h.id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN hospital_department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id AND dept.is_deleted = 0
d.is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY d.is_deleted ASC, d.rating DESC
SELECT FROM doctor_info WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.hospital_id, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.academic_background, d.schedule_time, d.consultation_fee, d.rating, d.is_deleted, d.create_time, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, dept.dept_name FROM doctor_info d LEFT JOIN hospital_info h ON d.hospital_id = h.id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN hospital_department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id AND dept.is_deleted = 0 WHERE d.id = #{id} AND d.is_deleted = 0

SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.hospital_id, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.academic_background, d.schedule_time, d.consultation_fee, d.rating, d.is_deleted, d.create_time, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, dept.dept_name FROM doctor_info d LEFT JOIN hospital_info h ON d.hospital_id = h.id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN hospital_department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id AND dept.is_deleted = 0 WHERE d.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.rating DESC

SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.hospital_id, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.academic_background, d.schedule_time, d.consultation_fee, d.rating, d.is_deleted, d.create_time, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, dept.dept_name FROM doctor_info d LEFT JOIN hospital_info h ON d.hospital_id = h.id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN hospital_department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id AND dept.is_deleted = 0
d.hospital_id = #{hospitalId}
AND d.is_deleted = 0
ORDER BY d.is_deleted ASC, d.rating DESC

SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.hospital_id, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.academic_background, d.schedule_time, d.consultation_fee, d.rating, d.is_deleted, d.create_time, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, dept.dept_name FROM doctor_info d LEFT JOIN hospital_info h ON d.hospital_id = h.id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN hospital_department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id AND dept.is_deleted = 0 WHERE d.dept_id = #{deptId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY d.rating DESC

SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.hospital_id, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.academic_background, d.schedule_time, d.consultation_fee, d.rating, d.is_deleted, d.create_time, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, dept.dept_name FROM doctor_info d LEFT JOIN hospital_info h ON d.hospital_id = h.id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN hospital_department dept ON d.hospital_id = dept.hospital_id AND d.dept_id = dept.id AND d.is_deleted = 0 AND dept.is_deleted = 0 WHERE d.hospital_id = #{hospitalId} AND d.is_deleted = 0 AND dept.dept_name = #{deptName} ORDER BY d.rating DESC

SELECT d.id, d.doctor_name, d.hospital_id, d.dept_id, d.title, d.specialty, d.academic_background, d.schedule_time, d.consultation_fee, d.rating, d.is_deleted, d.create_time, d.update_time, h.hospital_name, dept.dept_name FROM doctor_info d LEFT JOIN hospital_info h ON d.hospital_id = h.id AND h.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN hospital_department dept ON d.dept_id = dept.id AND dept.is_deleted = 0
d.is_deleted = 0
AND REPLACE(REPLACE(d.doctor_name, '医生', ''), '医师', '') LIKE CONCAT('%', REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, '医生', ''), '医师', ''), '%') AND CHAR_LENGTH(REPLACE(REPLACE(#{keyword}, '医生', ''), '医师', '')) > 0
ORDER BY d.is_deleted ASC, d.rating DESC
mapper.update:
UPDATE doctor_info
doctor_name = #{doctorName},
hospital_id = #{hospitalId},
dept_id = #{deptId},
title = #{title},
specialty = #{specialty},
academic_background = #{academicBackground},
schedule_time = #{scheduleTime},
consultation_fee = #{consultationFee},
rating = #{rating},
update_time = #{updateTime}
WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0

UPDATE doctor_info SET doctor_name = #{doctorName}, hospital_id = #{hospitalId}, dept_id = #{deptId}, title = #{title}, specialty = #{specialty}, academic_background = #{academicBackground}, schedule_time = #{scheduleTime}, consultation_fee = #{consultationFee}, rating = #{rating}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
